zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mainwaring於1390年出生在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福時，他的父親William Mainwaring II30歲，母親Mary Margery Davenport15歲。他於1405年與Amicia DeLeycester在英國英格蘭爾米德列維其結婚。他去世於1450年在英國英格蘭爾米德列維其享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾米德列維其聖 邁克爾 安德 哥吉拉 安爾也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mainwaring was born in 1390, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Mainwaring II, was 30 and his mother, Mary Margery Davenport, was 15. He married Amicia DeLeycester in 1405, in Middlewich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1450, in Middlewich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in St Michael And All Angels' Church, Middlewich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: William Mainwaring(이)가 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 p오버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Mainwaring II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Margery Davenport(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 미들루이치에서 Amicia DeLeycester(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 미들루이치에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 미들루이치 스트 믹하얼 앤드 앨 앤그스' c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mainwaring родился в 1390 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Mainwaring II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Margery Davenport, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Amicia DeLeycester в 1405 г. в местности миддльвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1450 г. в местности миддльвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мачаел анд алл ангелс' чурч, миддльвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
